codeReview.summary: Reviewed the fix rerun against the prior blocking findings in broward-expansion. The fix commit adds a third distinct Broward ArcGIS endpoint (bcgishub.broward.org) in COUNTY_CONFIGS and updates Broward validation tests to enforce the contract threshold of >=3 distinct hosts. County-aware PA routing behavior (Broward->BCPA, Miami-Dade->Miami-Dade PA) is unchanged by this fix and remains covered by mocked HTTP tests in the existing Broward expansion test suite.

summary: Pass. The two original blocking issues were fully resolved: Broward now attempts >=3 distinct ArcGIS hosts, and tests now assert the same >=3 contract threshold. Evidence was gathered from the fix handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and comparison with the prior failed review.
